interpretation: G3 LaneMap codegen arm now emits a named wave32 gate/up program without owned warp or lane-partition bridge attribution. W==D decides whether it is promotable or only a generated custom-shape probe.
next_action: Implement G3.1 one-word-per-lane lowering hook; first target is a generated gate/up program shape with wave32 row ownership and packed uint32 word load bound to word_col.
